description:
You are an architect. A homeowner wants a sunroom addition on the rear of the Contemporary House. Design and build it with the following specifications:

Structure: Draw a new rectangular room (approximately 12 feet wide by 10 feet deep) extending from the back wall of the house. Connect the sunroom to the house interior through a door placed on the shared wall. Install windows on each of the sunroom's three exterior-facing walls.

Interior: Apply a wood flooring material to the sunroom floor. Furnish the sunroom as a sitting area with a table and at least 2 chairs.

Export the 2D floor plan showing the addition and door connection to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\sunroom_floorplan.jpg, a 3D exterior view from the backyard showing the sunroom and windows to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\sunroom_exterior.jpg, and a 3D interior view showing the furnished sunroom with flooring to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\sunroom_interior.jpg. Save the project as sunroom_design.dpn in C:\Users\Docker\Documents.
